expectations.text: Explains that GitHub Actions builds the Docker image
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 details GitHub Actions workflows, path triggers, and three-job structure.

expectations.text: References ghcr.io as the image registry
expectations.evidence: References ghcr.io/scgcwebmaster/ and GitHub Container Registry.

expectations.text: Explains the deploy-test branch image tag update mechanism
expectations.evidence: Explains deploy job checks out deploy-test, uses sed, commits and pushes.

expectations.text: Explains the pull-based sync via systemd timer
expectations.evidence: Phase 2 details scgc-sync-data.timer, 5-minute fires, pull --ff-only in worktrees.

expectations.text: Explains the systemd path unit that triggers deployment
Presents steps in correct order: push -> build -> push image -> update deploy branch -> sync -> detect -> deploy
expectations.evidence: Three phases in correct order with timeline diagram.
